title: ConstraintInteractionMap
description: Structured matrix mapping constraint interactions and outcomes under real deployment conditions.

interactions.bottleneck: Government Resolution (GR) guidelines mandate modern dynamic cloud services, but public procurement laws enforce standard L1 lowest-cost bidding, which favors cheap, low-quality static software providers.
interactions.dependency_chain: NEP Guidelines -> Tender RFP specifications -> L1 bid selection -> Vendor default -> Deployment freeze.
interactions.exception_pressure: High. Departments routinely draft urgent emergency shortcuts to bypass tenders and directly nominate specialized technical bodies.

interactions.bottleneck: Syllabus policies mandate localized mother-tongue instruction, which reinforces the need to build strictly isolated regional-language vector indices and prevents English CBSE text bleed.
interactions.dependency_chain: SCF language mandates -> MSCERT textbook translation -> Balbharati local print -> RAG metadata-isolated vector ingestion.
interactions.exception_pressure: Low. Language guidelines are non-negotiable and cannot be bypassed via exceptions.

interactions.bottleneck: Generative AI tutors require interactive voice and text logging to personalize learning pacing, but DPDP mandates strict parental consent and outlaws child profiling or long-term data collection.
interactions.dependency_chain: AI personalization engine -> Telemetry data collection -> Consent validation hook -> DB partition block -> Model response limit.
interactions.exception_pressure: High. Startups are lobbying for simplified 'class-wide' consent models to bypass individual minor data validations.

interactions.bottleneck: Central NCF guidelines push for immediate standard textbook modernization, but state MSCERT councils demand custom localized adaptations, delaying final textbook approvals.
interactions.dependency_chain: National NCF framework -> State curriculum committee -> Balbharati printing -> School syllabus rollout.
interactions.exception_pressure: Medium. State departments frequently issue temporary textbook transition GRs allowing old textbooks to remain active.

interactions.bottleneck: A complex educational technology tender is designed by a progressive IAS officer, but their sudden transfer mid-tender causes the new officer to restart the entire review process from scratch.
interactions.dependency_chain: Officer design -> Tender publication -> Officer transfer -> New officer audit -> Project review -> Tender scrap.
interactions.exception_pressure: Very High. System integrators lobby hard during transition periods to modify tender specifications in their favor.

interactions.bottleneck: Audit departments demand rigid adherence to standard operating procedures and verified databases, which restricts developers from deploying dynamic, rapidly evolving LLM personalizations.
interactions.dependency_chain: Developer hotfix -> Telemetry log -> Audit check -> Security warning -> Development pause.
interactions.exception_pressure: High. Development teams deploy 'shadow hotfixes' outside standard audit controls to maintain user feature requests.

interactions.bottleneck: Procurement installs smart classroom boards in rural public schools, but local power grid failures and missing backup batteries render the boards unusable for most of the school week.
interactions.dependency_chain: MPSP smart board tender -> Physical installation -> Power grid failure -> Missing local IT help -> Hardware orphaning.
interactions.exception_pressure: Low. Physical constraints cannot be resolved by administrative shortcuts.

interactions.bottleneck: Curriculum revisions containing sensitive historical or social topics spark political protests, forcing state education departments to freeze textbook distributions.
interactions.dependency_chain: Syllabus revision -> Textbook printing -> Media controversy -> Political protest -> Ministry freeze order.
interactions.exception_pressure: High. Bureaucrats utilize emergency shortcuts to quickly print revised 'neutral' versions.

interactions.bottleneck: State board mandates basic AI coding curriculum in Standard 8 Science, but rural school teachers lack standard computer literacy and cannot explain basic coding logic.
interactions.dependency_chain: AI curriculum mandate -> Balbharati publishing -> Classroom delivery -> Teacher confusion -> Classroom skip.
interactions.exception_pressure: Medium. School principals hire local computer science students or volunteers to bypass teaching shortages.

interactions.bottleneck: Union MoE mandates centralized platform integrations (DIKSHA), but state departments demand regional software sovereignty, stalling cross-platform synchronization.
interactions.dependency_chain: Central MoE mandate -> State integration challenge -> Software silo -> Sync mismatch.
interactions.exception_pressure: Medium. States create local state-level digital platforms while maintaining basic mock APIs to satisfy central audits.
